lines: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
Dates are written in DD/MM/YYYY order.
+* Removed `into_ref` buffers' method. It is useless and its misuse could trigger a heap-use-after-free (thanks to Athanasios Trispiotis).
@@ -21,10 +21,6 @@ impl<'buf, T, const N: usize, I: IterComponent> IntoRef
impl<'buf, T, const N: usize, I: NonMutIterComp> OneRingBuf<StackStorage<'buf, T, N>, I> {
@@ -62,10 +58,6 @@ impl<'buf, T, const N: usize, I: MutIterComp> OneRingBuf<StackStorage<'buf, T, N
impl<T, I: IterComponent> IntoRef for OneRingBuf<HeapStorage<T>, I> {
impl<T, I: IterComponent> IntoRef for OneRingBuf<VmemStorage<T>, I> {
/// Returns two iterators: a Producer and a Consumer.
@@ -7,13 +7,8 @@ pub(crate) trait BufRef: Deref<Target = Self::Buffer> + Clone {
-/// Trait used to create a shared reference out of a buffer.
-/// This trait is not meant to be implemented outside of this crate, nor
-/// are its methods meant to be called directly.
-/// Instead, this trait should be used only as parameter/bound.
+/// One of the traits implemented by ring buffers; useful only as a type-restrictor in signatures.
+/// `TargetRef` indicates which ref should be used to handle the inner buffer.
